Playground / Grid Background

Preview theme

Grid Background

Experiment

A static canvas layer that renders the dot grid and line grid used inside GravityWell. Use it standalone as a textured background, or compose it beneath a GravityWell with its own static layers disabled.

Interactive editor

What do you want to build?

Describe your idea and I'll help bring it to life

Toggles

Spacing & size

Step28px
Dot radius0.9
Line width0.4
Major everyoff

Colors

tsxGenerated snippet
<GridBackground
  showDots={false}
  dotColor="var(--neutral-400)"
  staticGridColor="rgba(147, 197, 230, 0.38)"
  background="#ffffff"
/>

Default

Layers

Dots only

Lines only

Both

Step size

24px

38px

56px

Props

PropTypeDefaultDescription
backgroundstringvar(--neutral-50)Canvas fill color. Set to "transparent" to skip the fill entirely.
dotColorstringvar(--effect-gravity-dot)Color of the static dot grid.
staticGridColorstringvar(--effect-gravity-grid)Color of the faint static line grid.
showDotsbooleantrueToggle the dot grid layer.
showStaticGridbooleantrueToggle the static line grid layer.
stepnumber38Pixel spacing between dots and grid lines.
dotRadiusnumber0.9Radius of each dot in pixels.
lineWidthnumber0.4Stroke width of the grid lines in pixels.
colorRingstring[][]Angle-based color ring. Each element cycles through the array based on angle from the canvas center, creating a radial rainbow.
majorEverynumber0Draw a heavier major line every N cells. 0 = disabled.
majorLineWidthnumber1.0Stroke width of major grid lines in pixels.
majorGridColorstring—Color for major grid lines. Falls back to staticGridColor when unset.
classNamestring—Additional class names.
styleReact.CSSProperties—Inline styles.

Usage

tsx
import { GridBackground } from '@spaceship/design-system';

// Full background layer — fill a positioned container
<div style={{ position: 'relative', height: 300 }}>
  <GridBackground />
  <div style={{ position: 'relative', zIndex: 1 }}>Content</div>
</div>

// Dots only
<GridBackground showStaticGrid={false} />

// Lines only
<GridBackground showDots={false} />

// Composed under GravityWell (suppress GravityWell's own static layers)
<div style={{ position: 'relative', height: 300 }}>
  <GridBackground />
  <GravityWell
    background="transparent"
    showDots={false}
    showStaticGrid={false}
  />
</div>
